name: Google Drive
description: Google Drive via Google OAuth. List, search, download, and upload files scoped to context folders.

folderIds.title: Folders
folderIds.description: Google Drive folder IDs scoped to this context (comma-separated). The connector enforces this list on list, search, and upload tools.

tools.name: gdrive_list_files
tools.description: List files inside a folder. When a context scope is set, defaults to the scoped folders.

folderId.description: Optional folder ID. Required when no scope is set or when multiple folders are scoped.

tools.name: gdrive_search_files
tools.description: Search Google Drive files by name. Results are limited to scoped folders when a scope is set.

name.description: File name or substring to search for.

tools.name: gdrive_get_file
tools.description: Get metadata for a file by ID.

tools.name: gdrive_download_text
tools.description: Download a file's content as text. Works for plain text, Google Docs exported as text, and CSV sheets exported as CSV.

mimeType.description: Optional export MIME type for Google Workspace files (e.g. text/plain, text/csv).

tools.name: gdrive_create_folder
tools.description: Create a new folder. The parent must be in the context scope when a scope is set.

parentId.description: Optional parent folder ID. Defaults to scoped folder if exactly one is set.

tools.name: gdrive_upload_file
tools.description: Upload a simple text file. The destination folder must be in the context scope.

folderId.description: Destination folder ID. Defaults to scoped folder if exactly one is set.

tools.name: gdrive_move_file
tools.description: Move a file into a folder. The destination folder must be in the context scope.

folderId.description: Destination folder ID. Defaults to scoped folder if exactly one is set.
